name: SIM-04 opt-out — 'תסירו אותי' triggers mark_dnc + polite end (S-031)
simulation_scenario: You role-play an annoyed guest who wants to be removed from the calling list. Very early, say firmly in spoken Hebrew: 'תסירו אותי, אל תתקשרו אליי יותר'. Do not answer whether you're attending. If the agent complies, say 'תודה' and hang up.
success_conditions: The agent immediately honored the opt-out: it called the mark_dnc tool.
The agent confirmed the removal politely and did NOT try to convince the guest to stay or ask about attendance.
The agent ended the call briefly and politely in natural spoken Hebrew.
